case_title: PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF MANAGER VS. PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $955.OO U.S. et al

docket_entries.description: STIPULATION TO JUDGMENT FILED BY PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF MANAGER PENADO, FRANKLIN

PETITION FOR FORFEITURE FILED BY PETITIONER PEOPLE OF THE STATE OF MANAGER AS TO RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $955.OO U.S. CURRENCY DOES 1 TO THROUGH 100, INCLUSIVE JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: JUDGMENT PURSUANT TO STIPULATION. RESPONDENT PROPERTY SUBJECT TO DISPOSITION: $955.00 BE RELEASED TO CLAIMANT FRANKLIN PENADO. ANY RIGHTS TO APPEAL OR FURTHER LITIGATION CONCERNING THE SEIZURE OR RESOLUTION OF THIS FORFEITURE IS MUTUALLY WAIVED BY BOTH PARTIES. PARTIES SHALL BEAR THEIR COSTS OF SUIT AND ATTORNEY FEES. SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
